_comment: MedGraph Health Data Access — CARD Set Template v0.1.0. This is the CARD Stack that MedGraph requires from CARD-Carrying Agents. Fill in principal.id, entity_card.agent_id, entity_card.principal_id, and entity_card.certification_hash before presentation.

data_resources.description: Read health records including lab results, journal entries, and uploaded documents

excluded_resources.reason: Agent may not change account configuration
Agent may not view or modify consent agreements
Agent may not access the audit trail
Agent has no access to authentication credentials

data_card.nhb_readable_summary: Your agent can read your medical records — lab results, journal entries, and uploaded documents. It cannot change your account settings or view consent history.

permitted_actions.description: Summarize lab results and health records in plain language
Search across your health records for specific conditions, dates, or results
Compare results over time to identify trends

prohibited_actions.reason: Agent may not modify or create health records
Agent may not delete any records
Agent may not share records with third parties
Agent may not provide medical diagnoses
Agent may not bulk-download records for external storage

use_card.nhb_readable_summary: Your agent can summarize, search, and compare your health records. It cannot modify records, share them, or make diagnoses.

boundary_card.nhb_readable_summary: This session only — no data retained after you close CROCbox. Up to 5 requests per minute. Your health data never leaves MedGraph.
